ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store including street and city */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the store */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude for geographical mapping */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude for geographical mapping */,
  "store_status" TEXT /* Status of the store (e.g., active, closed, under renovation) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager responsible for the store */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the store record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the store record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service (e.g., ATM, Gas Station) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service offered */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the service (e.g., financial, food, automotive) */,
  "is_essential" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the service is essential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_services" (
  "store_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store providing the service */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service available at the store */,
  "service_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the service became available at the store */,
  "service_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the service will no longer be available at the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_services_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_services_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, employee) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for user contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, data retrieval) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the item is available */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the inventory item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Quantity at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the sale occurred */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory item sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store offering the promotion */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage discount for the promotion */,
  "minimum_spend" REAL /* Minimum amount a customer must spend to qualify for the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location change entry */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store whose location changed */,
  "old_address" TEXT /* Previous address of the store */,
  "new_address" TEXT /* New address of the store */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the address change was recorded */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the address change (e.g., expansion, relocation) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the address change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_locations_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "franchises" (
  "franchise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each franchise */,
  "franchise_name" TEXT /* Name of the franchise */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the franchise */,
  "franchise_type" TEXT /* Type of franchise (e.g., corporate, independent) */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the franchise was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("franchise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_franchises" (
  "store_franchise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store */,
  "franchise_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the franchise the store belongs to */,
  "franchise_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the store became part of the franchise */,
  "franchise_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the store will cease to be part of the franchise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_franchise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_franchises_franchise_id FOREIGN KEY ("franchise_id") REFERENCES franchises ("franchise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_franchises_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store receiving the feedback */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the customer's feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating from the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response from the store to the customer's feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operational record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Store opening hours */,
  "closing_hours" TEXT /* Store closing hours */,
  "days_open" TEXT /* Days of the week the store is open */,
  "is_24_hours" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the store operates 24 hours a day */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the operational hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store associated with the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign (e.g., young adults, families) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)
